CustomField.formula: IF( LastModifiedDate__c <= TODAY()-5, IF( CONTAINS( $Api.Partner_Server_URL_260, "/portalcrnstaging/" ), TEXT(DAY(LastModifiedDate__c)) + "-" + TEXT(MONTH(LastModifiedDate__c)) + "-" + TEXT(YEAR(LastModifiedDate__c)) + " " + IMAGE("/portalcrnstaging/resource/Kanban", "Kanban", 20, 20), IF( CONTAINS( $Api.Partner_Server_URL_260, "/portalcrn/" ), TEXT(DAY(LastModifiedDate__c)) + "-" + TEXT(MONTH(LastModifiedDate__c)) + "-" + TEXT(YEAR(LastModifiedDate__c)) + " " + IMAGE("/portalcrn/resource/Kanban", "Kanban", 20, 20), TEXT(DAY(LastModifiedDate__c)) + "-" + TEXT(MONTH(LastModifiedDate__c)) + "-" + TEXT(YEAR(LastModifiedDate__c)) + " " + IMAGE("/resource/Kanban", "Kanban", 20, 20) ) ), TEXT(DAY(LastModifiedDate__c)) + "-" + TEXT(MONTH(LastModifiedDate__c)) + "-" + TEXT(YEAR(LastModifiedDate__c)) )
CustomField.label: Data da ultima modificação Portal
